offer_signals: End-to-end event logistics and on-site delivery
Production budgets, schedules and supplier coordination
Cross-functional delivery in a premium event context
offers.match_explanation: More than 70 delivered events, production budgets up to EUR 180,000 and multi-venue technical coordination provide direct evidence for the central delivery requirements.
offers.truthful_gap: Supplier negotiation, formal safety ownership and prior luxury-agency experience are not claimed.

offer_signals: Event delivery from brief through opening
Schedules, budgets, logistics and production documentation
offers.match_explanation: The candidate's exhibition and public-programme work demonstrates end-to-end planning, live delivery and coordination across technical and visitor-facing teams.
offers.truthful_gap: Formal recruiting, host-team retention and uniform management are not claimed.

offer_signals: Delivery of varied event and content formats
Venue, travel, supplier and production logistics
offers.match_explanation: Talks, workshops, performances and touring installations provide transferable evidence for varied-format event delivery and operational coordination.
offers.truthful_gap: Hivebrite, HubSpot, accommodation, catering, margins and invoicing are not claimed.

offers.match_explanation: Touring installations, lender agreements, supplier consultations and documented budget control support the production-administration core of the role.
offers.truthful_gap: Payroll, social and tax administration, WordPress and specialist accounting tools are not claimed.

offer_signals: Budgets, invoices, payments and funding support
offers.match_explanation: Concurrent productions, centralised records, contract-adjacent work and budget control provide strong evidence for production follow-up and financial documentation.
offers.truthful_gap: Assignment-contract ownership, named touring formalities, invoicing, payment reminders and grant applications are not claimed.

offers.selection_reason: Eligible signal, but seniority and score placed it below the five-offer campaign cutoff.
Eligible signal, but the more generic project scope ranked below the five-offer campaign cutoff.

offers.role: Charge de production visuelle et audiovisuelle (H/F)
offers.selection_reason: The audiovisual-production emphasis was less supported than the selected cultural-production roles.
Lower fit and incomplete employer context placed it below the five-offer campaign cutoff.
